chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-204 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 14.06.2023 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh along with SIP Muhammad Bux Lakho. ----- Syed Sarfaraz Ali Shah advocate has filed power on behalf of the petitioners whereas Mr. Kewal Kumar advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.1 to 6, which are taken on record. Petitioners are present. Learned counsel for petitioners submits that petitioner No.1’s medical test has been conducted and she is shown to be 20 years of age. Further, her statement u/s 164 CrPC has been recorded in which she has supported factum of her freewill marriage. IO present submits that he has not caused any harassment to the petitioners. In any case, this petition has been filed only against harassment. IO has undertaken that he would deal with the matter in accordance with law as far as FIR registered by the mother of petitioner No.1 is concerned. In view of such undertaking, this petition is disposed of with consent. However, the parties are at liberty to pursue further remedy in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
